title: 5.4% Yield And Up To 10% Annual Return Potential - Buying Top-Tier Income With ONEOK
text: ONEOK stands out with a 25-year dividend history, a 5.4% yield, and slow but secure dividend growth. OKE's diversified operations, acquisitions, and expansion into key regions position it for sustained growth. OKE's expected growth and over 5% dividend yield make it a compelling potential choice for my portfolio.

title: ONEOK: Deleveraging Likely To Limit Dividend Growth
text: Oneok's dividend growth is likely to be modest due to a focus on deleveraging after its acquisition of Magellan. Oneok operates primarily in the central United States and has significant operations in the Williston Basin and Permian Basin. The company's earnings are largely fee-based, but there is some commodity sensitivity, particularly in periods of lower natural gas prices.

title: December's 5 Dividend Growth Stocks With 5.10%+ Yields
text: Dividend growth stocks can provide reliable cash flows and long-term wealth to income investors. In this monthly publication, we screen dividend stocks based on safety, growth, and consistency, which are important for income investors. The five dividend stocks we are touching on today are Altria, Philip Morris International, Manulife Financial Corp., LyondellBasell Industries N.V., and NETSTREIT Corp.

title: ONEOK to Participate in Wells Fargo Midstream and Utilities Symposium
text: TULSA, Okla., Dec. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE: OKE) will participate in the Wells Fargo Midstream and Utilities Symposium Dec. 6-7, 2023, in New York.
